concepts.description: Loop sin condición de salida - causa CPU infinite y bloqueo
detection_approaches: tree-sitter: detect 'loop' keyword with no 'break' statement in body and no condition that can become false
track loop condition variable mutations within loop body
false_positives: loop con break condicional que depende de input
loop con contador que se incrementa
tokio::spawn宏观loop con shutdown flag

concepts.description: División donde el denominador puede ser cero en runtime
detection_approaches: track variable used as denominator, check if zero is reachable path
constant folding: division by literal zero
dataflow: denominador puede ser variable igualada a 0
false_positives: denominador checkeado con if x != 0 antes de dividir
división por constante no-cero conocida en compile time

concepts.description: Uso de mem::uninitialized() que crea valores no inicializados
detection_approaches: tree-sitter: detect call_expr 'mem::uninitialized' or 'std::mem::uninitialized'
also detect MaybeUninit without assume_init
false_positives: MaybeUninit con assume_init bien usado
mem::zeroed cuando cero es valor válido

concepts.description: Desreferenciación de null - acceso a Option::None como si tuviera valor
detection_approaches: detect unwrap()/expect() en Option/Result en path sin check previo
dataflow: variablebind to Some/Ok value before unwrap
false_positives: unwrap en test code
unwrap después de is_some()/is_ok() check
unwrap en resultado de parse que se valida

concepts.description: Acceso a índice fuera del rango válido de un array/slice/vec
detection_approaches: track array length vs index expression
detect index >= len() or index < 0 patterns
constant folding en índices
false_positives: uso de get() que retorna Option
check de bounds con if antes del acceso
iteradores en lugar de index

concepts.description: Código inalcanzable - código que nunca se ejecuta
detection_approaches: control flow analysis: code after return/break/continue
pattern matching: unreachable arms
detect if-else where both branches call panic/abort
false_positives: code behind #[cfg(test)]
match arms with panic! that are intentionally exhaustive
generics con type bounds que solo se satisfacen en tests

concepts.description: Comparación con NaN - comparaciones con floats NaN siempre retornan false
detection_approaches: detect comparisons (==, !=, <, >, <=, >=) with NaN constant or f32/f64 NaN return
track f32/f64 type annotations and NaN-creating operations
false_positives: use of is_nan() to explicitly check
comparisons in test code con OrderedFloat
partialeq on NaN contexts

concepts.description: Overflow de entero sin check - operación aritmética que excede el rango del tipo en modo debug
detection_approaches: detect +, -, *, / operations on integer types without checked_/saturating_/wrapping_
constant folding: overflow in literal expressions
track increment/decrement in loops
false_positives: use of checked_add/saturating_mul/etc
wrapping types (Wrapping<T>)
release builds donde overflow es modular

concepts.description: unwrap()/expect() en producción - causa panic si el valor es None/Err
detection_approaches: detect .unwrap() and .expect() calls on Option/Result
filter: allow in test modules (#[cfg(test)])
filter: allow in main.rs o lib.rs con appropriate context
false_positives: unwrap en test code
unwrap en examples
unwrap after validation check
unwrap on known-good parse results

concepts.description: Patrón regex inválido - Regex::new() con patrón malformado causa panic
detection_approaches: detect Regex::new() / RegexBuilder::new() calls with string literals
constant folding: validate regex at compile time if possible
track dynamic regex patterns
false_positives: use of lazy_regex or regex! macros
regex patterns validated with is_match() before new()
test code

concepts.description: Off-by-one error - bound incorrecto en condiciones de rango de loop
detection_approaches: compare loop bound with container.len() / .iter().count()
detect i <= len vs i < len off-by-one patterns
track for loop range vs collection size
false_positives: range literals con correct inclusive/exclusive bounds
use of .iter() instead of index-based loop
custom iterators con known correct bounds

concepts.description: drop() llamado dos veces - doble limpieza del mismo recurso
detection_approaches: detect explicit drop() calls on variables
track scope exits with values moved out
identify Copy types passed to drop
false_positives: drop on different variables
drop after mem::forget
Drop impl on type with interior mutability

concepts.description: Confusión de precedencia lógica - && y || mezclados sin paréntesis
detection_approaches: detect binary expressions mixing && and || without parentheses
flag && precedence confusion: a || b && c should be a || (b && c) but often means (a || b) && c
false_positives: explicit parentheses clarifying intent
simple cases where precedence is unambiguous
test code with documented expected behavior

concepts.description: Condiciones contradictorias - x > 10 && x < 5 siempre es falso
detection_approaches: detect binary comparisons with same variable that are mutually exclusive
constant folding: x > 10 && x < 5
track variable range constraints across conditions
false_positives: conditions involving different variables
float types donde NaN makes comparisons non-trivial
generic type parameters con unknown bounds

concepts.description: Asignación redundante - variable asignada pero nunca leída antes de nueva asignación
detection_approaches: dataflow: variable written but never read before next write
track use-definition chains
identify unused assignments in basic blocks
false_positives: variable reassigned in loop
variable used for debug logging
variable with side effects in assignment expression
reassignment as swap pattern
